mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_follow (follower_id, following_id, created_at) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forum_follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.follower_id, f.following_id, u.username as following_username, u.email as following_email, u.role as following_role, u.favorites_count as following_favorites_count, u.likes_count as following_likes_count, u.following_count as following_following_count, u.followers_count as following_followers_count, u.created_at as following_created_at, f.created_at FROM forum_follow f INNER JOIN forum_user u ON f.following_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT f.id, f.follower_id, f.following_id, u.username as following_username, u.email as following_email, u.role as following_role, u.favorites_count as following_favorites_count, u.likes_count as following_likes_count, u.following_count as following_following_count, u.followers_count as following_followers_count, u.created_at as following_created_at, f.created_at FROM forum_follow f INNER JOIN forum_user u ON f.follower_id = u.id WHERE f.following_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_follow WHERE follower_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_follow WHERE following_id = #{userId}
